title: Easy Online Booking
body: Book salon appointments 24/7 from your mobile or desktop. Instant confirmation for all beauty services.

title: Real-Time Slot Availability
body: See available time slots in real-time and choose what fits your schedule best for hair and beauty services.

title: Secure Online Payments
body: Pay securely online with multiple payment options and focus on your beauty experience.

title: Verified Customer Reviews
body: Make informed decisions with authentic reviews and ratings from other customers.

title: Wide Service Selection
body: From basic haircuts to bridal packages, find all beauty services in one platform.
